name.zh: 泰拉文件的下落 - 第3部分

itemName.zh: HighCom Striker ACHHC IIIA 头盔（黑色）

description.zh:
想知道这整个行动到底是关于什么吗？我肯定你已经忘了我们一开始为什么要做这个。哈哈，嗯，我不能怪你，那是很久以前的事了，那时我们注意到了这些运输货物。现在，我不是说我们在浪费时间 here，但是……我觉得我们需要退后几步。在海关区域某处，你和你的雇主正在调查这些奇怪的运输货物……是的，我知道这件事，但现在这不是重点，我们有工作要做。

在四号仓库下面，你曾经发现一辆乌拉尔卡车在运输泰拉集团的货物，对吧？嗯，问题是，你的同事认为他们是在把货物运到那个仓库，但实际上……他们是从那个仓库运出来，至少情报是这么说的，而你的工作就是去查明，寻找证据，如果你觉得合适，就在上面贴一些标记。

还有……你下载的文件让我们拿到了泰拉集团数据库的一些部分，所以我们可以访问一些运输日志，很酷对吧？但就像我说的，“一些”。我的一个SCAV联系人偶然发现了一个看起来可疑地完好无损的办公室，它位于海关区域某个大建筑工地西边的建筑里，你知道……就是有巨大筒仓的建筑，狙击手总是坐在那里，对，就是那个。

总之……也许你可以在办公室里面找到一些重要的东西，另一台笔记本电脑或电脑？假设你会找到，带一个闪存盘。下载所有必要的东西，并把驱动器留在电脑里，明白了吗？我会确保我的一些人待在靠近该区域的地方。一旦完成就离开该区域，这样我的人就可以拿到USB玩意儿，而不用担心意外射中你。

我希望很快能听到你的消息…… hopefully。
description.en:
Wanna know what this whole operation was even about? I'm sure you already forgot why we are doing this in the first place. Haha, well I can't blame you, that was some time ago now where we noticed these shipments. Now, I'm not saying we wasted our time here, but... I think we need to head a few steps back. Somewhere in the customs zone, you and your employers were investigating these strange shipments... Yes, I knew about that, but that is not the important thing right now, we got work to do.

Down at warehouse four you once spotted a ural truck that was transporting terragroup cargo, right? Well, here's the thing, your associates thought that they were transporting cargo to that warehouse, but in reality... They were transporting it from that warehouse, at least that is what intel says, and it's your job to find out, look for evidence and plant some markers on them if you feel like it.

Also... The files you downloaded let us get our hands on some parts of Terragroup's database, so we have access to a few shipment logs, cool right? But like I said, "a few". One of my scav contacts stumbled upon an office that looks suspiciously intact, it was located inside the building west of the big construction site somewhere in the customs zone, you know... The building with the giant silos, where the snipers always sit, yeah that one.

Anyway... Maybe you can find something important inside the office, another laptop or computer perhaps? Assuming you will find it, bring a flash drive. Download all necessary stuff and keep the drive plugged into the computer, got that? I'll make sure some of my guys will stay close to the area. Leave the zone once you're done so my guys can grab the USB thingy without needing to worry about shooting you by accident.

I'll hear from you soon... Hopefully.

name.zh: 泰拉文件的下落 - 第2部分
